# ThePeptideAI
> AI-powered peptide research assistant — RAG search, inventory tracking

## What this site does
ThePeptideAI is an AI-powered peptide research assistant. It provides RAG-based search across peptide research literature, inventory tracking for research peptides, and intelligent recommendations for researchers.

## Key pages
- https://thepeptideai.com: Main platform
- https://thepeptideai.com/#/crm: CRM landing — peptide business management
- https://thepeptideai.com/#/get-started: Sign up and onboarding
- https://thepeptideai.com/#/status: System status page

## API
REST API for peptide research queries and inventory management

## Contact
support@thepeptideai.com
